developer_response.body: Good to hear you like the game! But please don't ask for mod as that will result in me having to blacklist you and I dont want too!

reviews.review_title: So me and my friend plays this game
reviews.review_description: This is the best game ever when you get in the game you spawn in gorilla tag’s 2022 Christmas update and you get a free mod menu if you press x on your left controller the mods are ,platforms,fly,car monkey,speed boost (if use speed boost you will have it on for the whole game if you press it again it won’t turn off the only way to fix it is to leve the game) ,iron monkey,and no clip,and mosa settings(I don’t know how it works fun and has old caves mins and has cosmetics(buyable)and you start with 10,123 sinny rocks has two custom maps beach and stumble guys

developer_response.body: Wrong game, this isn't a copy its a fangame.

reviews.review_description: Developer and admins are very nice if there's a glitch it's patched instantly and it's fun would recommend
